title: Székesfehérvár, Fejér — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Székesfehérvár, Fejér: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Székesfehérvár is a city in Fejér with a population of 96,024. The City of Kings, where Hungarian kings were crowned for centuries, with a beautifully restored Baroque old town and a rich medieval heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
